how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_035_completed: BG_MAIN NAMEERROR FIXED — _open_agent_manager in dashboard_ui.py referenced BG_MAIN which was never defined in that file. Replaced 4 occurrences with BG (#1a1333). Agent Manager opens clean.

WORMBOT BASE_MODULE IMPORT FIXED — All 9 WormBot language modules used 'from modules.base_module import BaseModule' resolving to top-level Ethica modules/ package instead of local worm_bot/modules/. Fixed to relative import 'from .base_module import BaseModule' across all 9 files. new_language_module.py also had a pre-existing class definition corruption (doubled class name with mismatched paren) — fixed in same pass. File drop now works.

CANVAS FILE DROP BUILT — ScrollDrop widget added to canvas_window.py. _build_canvas_drop() and _on_canvas_file_drop() methods injected. Drop zone sits above status bar on every Canvas page. Smart routing by extension: .py/.js/.jsx/.ts/.tsx/.rs/.sh/.html/.css/.json → debug tab with correct language; .md/.txt/.rst/.scroll → document tab. Tab named after dropped file. Tested with .js and .yaml files — both routed and named correctly.

YAML SUPPORT ADDED — .yaml/.yml added to SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS in scroll_drop.py, DEBUG_MAP in canvas_window.py, LANGUAGES dict in debug_view.py (runner: None, ext: .yaml), and lang_map aliases in push_code_from_ethica(). Lang dropdown now shows YAML correctly on drop.
REKA + ORCHESTRATE ADDED TO ETHICAGUARD — Both modules were missing from MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. Added to list. guard seal confirm now seals all 30 modules including reka and orchestrate.
